japanese: 古池や蛙飛びこむ水の音
romaji: Furuike ya kawazu tobikomu mizu no oto
english: An old pond, a frog jumps in — the sound of water.
author: Matsuo Bashō

japanese: 旅に病で夢は枯野をかけめぐる
romaji: Tabi ni yamai de yume wa kareno wo kakemeguru
english: Illness on the road, dreams run through the withered fields.
author: Yosa Buson

japanese: 花の色は移りにけりないたづらに
romaji: Hana no iro wa utsuri ni keri na itazura ni
english: The colors of flowers have faded in vain.
author: Ono no Komachi
